meta.description: Premium law firm brand tokens for UI implementation.
meta.design_direction: Light mode — clean white, professional, authoritative, trustworthy

design_language.style: Clean professional light mode with authoritative navy and gold accents
design_language.hero: Full bleed courtroom or justice imagery with navy overlay and bold white headline
design_language.sections: Clean white backgrounds, generous whitespace, editorial typography
design_language.avoid: Dark mode, casual fonts, bright colors, wellness patterns, fitness patterns, real estate patterns
